guard.scanNeedsMediaRoot: Please set a valid media folder before scanning
guard.runNeedsEnv: Please fix the environment issues before running
guard.modelMissingMessage: The model you selected in Settings — "{{model}}" — hasn't been downloaded to this machine yet. Running transcription now will make the app silently fetch it from HuggingFace (several hundred MB to 1 GB depending on model size) and the UI will look frozen for the duration. We recommend downloading it from the Models tab first and then coming back to start transcription.
guard.modelMissingGuide: Find {{model}} in the list and click Download. Return to the Main tab once it finishes.

toast.scanLoopEnvBlocked: Scan complete, but fix the environment before running

notify.transcribeFailed: Transcription failed — check the Console for details.
